LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ADDUS HEALTHCARE INC. AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED IN PART, AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION (ELDER FINANCIAL ABUSE) AND THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION (UNFAIR BUSINESS PRACTICES). AS TO FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS SHOWING ADDUS TOOK OR ASSISTED IN THE TAKING, OR KNEW ABOUT THE CONDUCT BY OTHERS. AS TO THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION, PLAINTIFF MUST SPECIFY A PARTICULAR STATUTORY SCHEME THAT HAS BEEN VIOLATED BY ADDUS THAT SUPPORTS THIS CLAIM. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION (ELDER ABUSE). (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike off calendar, in view of ruling on demurrer. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-19-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ADDUS HEALTHCARE INC. AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained in part, and overruled in part. Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to first cause of action (Elder Financial Abuse) and third cause of action (unfair business practices). As to first cause of action, plaintiff must plead facts showing Addus took or assisted in the taking, or knew about the conduct by others. As to third cause of action, plaintiff must specify a particular statutory scheme that has been violated by Addus that supports this claim. Demurrer overruled as to second cause of action (Elder Abuse). (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
